textByHashes.0bc1d5b928d3a4c51f902c116c951a61cf7ce20c: To do my duty, of course. Ralos and Ranul wish us to bring about the end of this world. Only then will we see the birth of a new one.
textByHashes.0167ef016a64385b788b91d568b31abacb14989b: To do my duty, of course. Ralos and Ranul wish us to bring about the end of this world. Only then will we will all unite in Mictl.
textByHashes.f21b831f7d6502541a5c90df78e13f7d835cf2e7: I worship both Ralos and Ranul equally, for in reality they are one. They have been separated for now, but soon they will rejoin once more.
textByHashes.045196396761fc7715e14bedebaa3790c957b245: The Final Dawn is our destiny. Ralos and Ranul will unite us all and end this world, but in doing so, we will all play a part in forming a new one.
textByHashes.27baece46dede7784ff006a22d01f909c1c29cc1: The Final Dawn is our destiny. Ralos and Ranul will unite us all and end this world, but in doing so, they will grant us eternal life in Mictl.
